description: Mixmax is an inbox-based sales engagement tool for Gmail that adds tracking, templates, sequences, scheduling, and CRM sync to personalize and automate outreach.
overview: Mixmax brings sales engagement into Gmail and Outlook with email tracking, sequences, meeting scheduling, and real-time signals, syncing with Salesforce and HubSpot.
what_is: Mixmax is a sales engagement tool that works inside your inbox. It lets reps run personalized sequences, schedule meetings, and track engagement from Gmail or Outlook, so prospecting and follow-up happen where they already spend their day.

It fits sales development, account executives, and RevOps teams that want to automate follow-ups, prioritize prospects, and move quickly without switching tools. Setup is light, so teams usually see time savings and better response rates within days.

Mixmax integrates tightly with CRMs like Salesforce and HubSpot, embedding data and automating updates from the inbox. It is a lightweight, inbox-centric engagement tool rather than a heavy marketing-automation or enrichment platform.
